item.title: I saw nothing, I heard nothing, officer.

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Thursday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
i see brains
there goes my friday night
i guess
looks kinda shady
i'm hoping the picture is unrelated
it was me.. weird fetish
so it was bunk viagra
what could go wrong?
not bad
severely hard
wait what
that kid is cooler than i'll ever be
(Judge is 6'7")
patrick bateman
good to know?
amen brother
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: People will cry about anything
item.description: Why woke? Because they've included a slider to adjust the difficulty/speed of the game. "It's ruining the spirit of the game!" They cry. Doom has always had difficulty settings. What's more, you can crank the slider all the way up and it's harder/faster than baseline. I fucking hate people. I seriously want to hit people who use woke as an offensive term. I could at least see if they had rammed a bunch of LGBT content in (I wouldn't agree, but I could see where it would be deemed woke...especially if it contributed nothing) but for fuck's sake....a difficulty slider isn't woke
item.dc:creator: Syndicofberyl

item.title: First in, last out
item.description: When the Nazis were burning books, they started with LGBTQ stuff. When they started rounding people up for the camps they started with the LGBTQ population. History might not repeat, but it rhymes.

item.title: Eggs for everyone!!
item.description: It's not very much money but it's my money. This employer was super shitty to me and they shorted me on something but the person at the labour board said that the evidence that I provided was enough to proceed with a request. Hopefully they comply and that's that.
item.dc:creator: ImmortalChild

item.title: Friday HILARIOUS MEME Dump To Help You End The Week With A Giggle #831
item.description:
1. Gimme your best advice in the comments!
2. A masterpiece
3. Maan, I know that we imgurians are just bunch of weirdos, and I would still consider people who are in astrology to be even bigger weirdos. Like no star 3000 lights years is controlling whether you are trustworthy... like wtf? How does this even make sense>!>!
4. Instructions clear: pumped up the Jam
5
6
7. People: so what do you do when you're alone Introverts:
8
9. New Drake diss just dropped
10. She must be getting a lot of tips ;)
12. This is straight out of a cartoon. (glad the little guy is okay)
13. Merlin got them moves
14. Beer tax
15. Special announcement today: The RELEASE DATE for my wacky first person narrative game will be APRIL 16 2025. Little less than 3 weeks! :) Been working for 2 years on this game and recent playtests have been very good (except one 13 year old playtester, who just couldn't understand where to go). If you would like to help create some more hype for this weirdo indie game, please wishlist on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Can't take the DEI out of CO
item.description:
We gots legislation to protect black history. https://www.chalkbeat.org/colorado/2025/02/21/bill-would-create-black-history-standards-for-schools-amid-dei-attacks/
We gots legislation to help sick and disabled students get through school. https://leg.colorado.gov/bills/sb25-087#:~:text=The%20bill%20requires%20each%20institution,self%2Ddisclose%20the%20student's%20disability Meanwhile, in D.C.,
https://www.congress.gov/bill/119th-congress/house-bill/1282 Motherfucker... all your flagged DEI words are just a list of Colorado's government agencies and academic departments. We're more likely to constitutionalize "DEI" than rename every government related organization in the state. Efficiency... you keep on using that word. I do not think it means what you think it means. ?
Hello from the Void. *Edit for sauce links
item.dc:creator: currentlywithoutimagination

item.title: We set up Kitty Hospice for my sweet elder baby
item.description:
Shes checking out her new space. She seems happy to be away from the other cats and have her things so close. The room is her daddy’s office so it smells like him and she has one of his shirts. You know, I’ve had her since I was 17 and feed, water, and clean her but HE is her favorite.
She’s been getting confused and she’s starting to lose her vision. I don’t want her in large spaces unless I can monitor her.
I am hoping she’ll pass in her sleep cozy at home. She still purrs when I pet her, loves food, and can still hop up on things. If she seems to not be enjoying life anymore, I’ll take her in. Her name is Miguela and she’ll be 20 this year. She’s been the bestest kitty.
item.dc:creator: kittycrazy88
